title: How to add leading zeros to a number
task: Pad a number to a fixed width with zeros in front (e.g. for IDs or ZIP codes).
keywords: pad number with zeros google sheets

excel.note: TEXT with a zero-pattern pads to that many digits; result is text.

explanation: TEXT(value, "00000") formats the number with at least five digits, adding zeros on the left. 42 becomes '00042'. The result is text, so use it for display/export rather than further math.
